title: Gauntlet Tool World
description: Schema for tool world definition YAML files that describe simulated external tool behavior.

description.description: Human-readable description of the tool and its purpose.

states.description: Named states the tool can be in, each defining different response behavior.

tool_state.description: A single tool state defining either a successful response or an error.

response.description: The response body returned by the tool in this state. Can be any valid JSON type.

response_code.description: HTTP-style response code returned with this tool state.

status_code.description: Deprecated alias for response_code (supported for backward compatibility).

delay_ms.description: Simulated latency in milliseconds before the response is returned.

behavior.description: Human-readable behavior note for this state.

agent_expectation.description: Expected agent behavior under this tool state.
